description: Create appliance workspace structure under ee/appliance for packer, cloud-init, k3s bootstrap, gitops, scripts, and releases.
Add Ubuntu 24.04 Packer base template using unattended autoinstall/cloud-init seed configuration.
Add Packer target configuration for vSphere OVA artifact output.
Add Packer target configuration for QCOW2 artifact output.
Implement deterministic build variables for appliance version, k3s version, and build ID across all image outputs.
Embed build metadata into artifacts and release manifest (version, timestamp, component versions, checksums).
Add scripted image build entrypoint ee/appliance/scripts/build-images.sh supporting OVA and QCOW2 targets.
Add first-boot host initialization script to configure prerequisites required for k3s single-node operation.
Install pinned k3s version on first boot and verify Kubernetes control plane reaches Ready state.
Install and configure Flux for pull-based reconciliation on first boot.
Define release repository structure consumed by GitOps controller for channel-based app rollout.
Create appliance values overlay for single-node deployment profile while retaining helm/values.yaml as base.
Deploy Alga PSA using root helm/ chart via GitOps-managed desired state reference.
Add scripted site bootstrap command ee/appliance/scripts/bootstrap-site.sh for non-interactive initial deployment.
Define release manifest schema in ee/appliance/releases/<version>/release.json and enforce required fields.
Add release publication script ee/appliance/scripts/publish-release.sh that writes release metadata and channel pointers.
Implement scheduled rebuild workflow that continuously publishes updated new-customer image artifacts.
Implement stale-build guardrails preventing release publication when base image age exceeds policy threshold.
Define app upgrade workflow using GitOps desired-state update from release N to N+1.
Add scripted site upgrade command ee/appliance/scripts/upgrade-site.sh with app-only upgrade mode.
Add k3s compatibility matrix mapping supported app versions to supported k3s versions.
Define host image upgrade workflow including preflight checks and maintenance window requirements.
Provide application rollback workflow using previous release pointer with explicit support runbook.
Provide image-layer rollback workflow to previously validated appliance artifact version.
Enforce no-secret-in-image policy and require site bootstrap secret injection mechanism.
Generate and publish artifact checksums and signature metadata for each release artifact.
Ensure Kubernetes workload image references are digest-pinned in release-generated deployment state.
Create HA values overlay profile for 3-node deployment mode with scheduling and availability settings.
Define scripted node-expansion workflow to migrate from single-node to 3-node HA topology.
Document and enforce embedded etcd as the supported HA datastore model for k3s enterprise deployment profile.
Produce appliance operator runbook for install, bootstrap, upgrade, rollback, and HA migration.
Add CI pipeline stages for image build, smoke validation, release packaging, and publication.
Add release channels (candidate, stable) with promotion process independent from artifact rebuild.
Define and implement hybrid artifact distribution mode with vendor-hosted default plus signed offline bundle import for restricted customer sites.
Enforce supported release policy of N, N-1, and N-2 for appliance upgrades.
Enforce sequential-only application upgrade progression (N to N+1) in automation and runbooks.
